blueprint.role: Fuse AIDO-style biological foundation embeddings with perturbation and expression features.
blueprint.implementation_notes: Requires precomputed AIDO embeddings or an approved loader. Missing artifacts must be reported explicitly.
acceptance: Does not silently substitute random embeddings
Keeps large foundation model frozen unless task allows fine-tuning

hypothesis: Fuse AIDO-style biological foundation embeddings with perturbation and expression features.
limits: Model choice is manifest-driven. Planned blueprints materialize an implementation request instead of pretending to be executable.
